g.text: Deep learning uses large multi-layer neural networks that learn representations as part of training.
Image: pixels -> edges -> textures -> object parts -> class
Text: tokens -> word meanings -> phrase meaning -> answer
Audio: waveform/spectrogram -> sound patterns -> events -> prediction
Deep learning is still ML: ŷ = f(x; θ).
The difference is that θ includes many layer weights that learn representations.
